metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4627
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1c. In situ hybridization in mouse brain shows GluK3 mRNA was moderately expressed in the cerebral cortex, hippocampus and cerebellum. GluK3 mRNA was detected in granule cells in the dentate gyrus, interneurons in the hippocampal Ammon's horn, and interneurons in the cerebellum (Fig. 1h,m and r).

Figure 2. western blot (WB) characterization of the anti-GluK3 antibody in hippocampal lysate of wild type and GluK3-knockout mice.

Figure 4, 5. GluK3 was detected by western blot in PSD biochemical fractions from mouse hippocampus and cerebellum. Quantitative analysis of these observations show strong enrichment in PSD as compared to the P2 fraction (fig. 6).

Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: "C57BL/6N mice were purchased from Charles River Laboratories Japan (Yokohama, Japan)"

KAR-knockout mice
"GluK2, GluK3, GluK4, and GluK5-knockout (KO) mice were generated using ES cell line RENKA derived from C57BL/6N (PMID:17298852). Detailed characterization of GluK2-KO, GluK3-KO, and GluK5-KO mice was described in Figure S1. Production of GluK4-KO mice was previously reported (PMID:19726645)."

antibodies
"We produced anti-GluK1 antibody in the guinea pig against C-terminal 36 amino acid (aa) residues of mouse anti-GluK1 (898-934, NM_146072) and anti-GluK3 antibody in the rabbit against C-terminal 17 aa residues of mouse GluK3 (903-919, NM_001081097). We also used rabbit polyclonal antibodies to anti-GluK2 (Synaptic Systems, Goettingen, Germany), anti-GluK4 (PMID:19726645), and anti-GluK5 (Millipore Corporation, Bedford, MA, USA), which were raised against the C-terminal 55 aa residues of rat GluK2 (844-908, NM_019309), C-terminal 91 aa of mouse GluK4 (866-896, NM_175481) and C-terminal 21 aa of rat GluK5 (960-979, NM_031508)."
